title: Global Review 001
notes: Initial global architecture review. Established FTR-based backlog response and concern-thread model.

title: Global Review 002
notes: Follow-up global review. Showed positive architecture trend; shifted focus to semantic friction and repayable localized debt.

title: Global Review 003
notes: Public-surface and release-readiness review. Made user-surface adoption and onboarding confidence visible as steering concerns.

title: Topic Reviews: Domain
notes: Domain layer cleanup and post-cleanup state reviews.

title: Topic Reviews: FK Helper
notes: FK helper functional model, implementation, consolidation, and closure reviews.

title: Topic Reviews: Meta
notes: Meta carrier lifecycle, path inventory, payload semantics, and flattening reviews.

title: Topic Reviews: Package
notes: Package formation, boundary, enrichment-lookup, cell-codec, compact-multiaxis, and legend-reader reviews.

title: Topic Reviews: Model and Meta Boundary
notes: Review wave analyzing the Functional/Semantic Model boundary and the canonical _meta boundary. These four documents produced the semantic-model recut direction, the Intent-vs-Resolution persistence rule, and the meta-flattening hypothesis that shifted the project toward feature-local FK-helper contracts. The wave is the analytical precursor to the FK-helper consolidation arc.

title: Global Review 005: Domain Contract Registry and Metadata Reference Model
notes: Review 005 and Slice 0 through Slice 1d established the domain-contract/meta-reference control-loop mode and then paused further registry expansion.

title: Global Review 006: Consumer Pipeline Operability and Maintainer Autonomy
notes: Review 006 assessed real consumer pipelines and selected rules_path as the narrow first operability slice.

title: Global Review 007: Domain Intent vs Render / Adapter Boundary and Meta Simplification
notes: Review 007 assessed parser/render/adapter meta boundaries and selected a parser canonical-write allowlist guard before adapter implementation work.
